name: Dnipro (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the Dnipro river, after which the city is named
the wheat fields of the Dnipro region and the historic golden devices of the city arms

description: A blue field with horizontal yellow elements and the coat of arms of Dnipro centred — referencing the Dnipro river and the city's industrial-Cossack heritage.
history: Dnipro (founded as Yekaterinoslav in 1776 and renamed Dnipropetrovsk in 1926 before being shortened to Dnipro in 2016) is Ukraine's fourth-largest city and a centre of heavy industry on the middle Dnipro river. Its flag and arms reference the river and the city's Cossack and industrial heritage.
